user.description: Set up SteamTime, your steam-oven cooking companion.

notify.title: Notifications (optional)
notify.description: Pick your phone's notify service(s) to get built-in "add this dish" and "dish is done" alerts, with a Confirm added button. Leave this empty if you'd rather set up notifications yourself via the shipped blueprint, or don't want them at all. You can change this later from this integration's Configure button.

data_description.critical_add_alerts: Bypass Do Not Disturb / silent mode for "add this dish" alerts

init.title: Notifications
init.description: Pick your phone's notify service(s) to get built-in "add this dish" and "dish is done" alerts. Leave this empty to disable built-in notifications.

data_description.critical_add_alerts: Bypass Do Not Disturb / silent mode for "add this dish" alerts

start_session.name: Start session
start_session.description: Start a new cooking session with the given dishes, auto-sequenced longest steam time first.

dishes.name: Dishes
dishes.description: Each entry is either a library reference (dish_id, optional minutes) or an inline one-off dish (name, minutes, optional temperature).

confirm_dish.name: Confirm dish added
confirm_dish.description: Confirm a dish was physically added to the oven, starting its countdown.

cancel_session.name: Cancel session
cancel_session.description: Cancel the running session. Nothing is written to history.

add_dish.name: Add dish
add_dish.description: Add a custom dish to the library.

category.name: Category
category.description: One of vegetables, fish, meat, other.

update_dish.name: Update dish
update_dish.description: Replace a custom dish's fields. Predefined dishes cannot be updated.

category.name: Category
category.description: One of vegetables, fish, meat, other.

remove_dish.name: Remove dish
remove_dish.description: Remove a custom dish from the library. Predefined dishes cannot be removed.

get_dishes.name: Get dishes
get_dishes.description: Return the merged predefined + custom dish library.

restart_session.name: Restart session
restart_session.description: Start a new session from a history entry's frozen snapshot.

unknown_or_predefined_dish_id.message: No custom dish with id {dish_id} (predefined dishes cannot be modified).
